def spin_crystal_three_times ' 
     open file "spin_results.dat" w 
     for i = 1:3 
         mv th 0 
         wait 1 
         mv th 90 
         wait 1 
         mv th -90 
         writeline file "spin_results.dat", result 
     endfor 
     close file "spin_results.dat"
